info.title: Social Intel API
info.description:
# Instagram Influencer Search API

Search 33M+ Instagram profiles by niche, country, follower count, and gender. Get business contact emails for ~50% of accounts. No signup, no API keys, no subscription — just pay per request via x402.

## Why Use This API

- **One API call** replaces hours of manual Instagram research
- **Business emails** included (~50% of accounts have public contact email)
- **No account needed** — pay with USDC on Base or Solana, results returned instantly
- **Free demo** — add `?demo=true` to any search to preview 3 results at no cost
- **AI agent ready** — x402 protocol, MCP server, OpenAPI spec

## Use Cases

- Find fitness micro-influencers in the US for a supplement brand campaign
- Build a database of beauty influencers in India with contact emails
- Automate travel influencer outreach for hotel chains
- Monitor competitor brand ambassadors across categories

## Quick Start

**Try free:** `curl 'https://socialintel.dev/v1/search?query=yoga&demo=true'`

**Paid (full results):** Use any x402 client (e.g. `npx agentcash@latest fetch`)

## Dynamic Pricing

| Results | Price |
|---------|-------|
| 1-20    | $0.50 |
| 50      | $0.80 |
| 100     | $1.30 |

**Formula:** `price = $0.50 + max(0, limit - 20) × $0.01`

## Links

- [Documentation](https://socialintel.dev/docs)
- [API Reference](https://socialintel.dev/docs/api-reference/search)
- [MCP Server](https://smithery.ai/servers/socialintel/socialintel-mcp)
- [llms.txt](https://socialintel.dev/llms.txt)
- [skill.md](https://socialintel.dev/skill.md)
info.guidance: Social Intel API: find Instagram influencers by niche, country, and follower count. Get business emails for ~50% of accounts. No signup, no API keys, no subscription. Try free: GET /v1/search?query=yoga&demo=true (3 results, no payment). Full access: $0.50 for 20 results, up to $1.30 for 100 results (USDC on Base or Solana via x402).

get.summary: Search Instagram Influencers — pay per request with USDC
get.description:
Search Instagram influencers by keyword, category, demographics, or location.

Returns up to 100 influencer profiles per request. Each result includes username,
follower count, bio, category, and business email (when available).

**Dynamic pricing:** $0.50 for up to 20 results, +$0.01 per result above 20.
Examples: 20 results = $0.50, 50 results = $0.80, 100 results = $1.30.

**Free demo:** Add `demo=true` to try the API with no payment. Returns up to 3 results,
no USDC required. Rate limited to 5 requests per hour per IP.

Payment via x402 (USDC on Base or Solana). No API keys required.

post.summary: Search Instagram Influencers — pay per request with USDC (JSON body)
post.description:
Search Instagram influencers via JSON body (POST). Same as GET /v1/search.

Accepts all the same parameters as query params but as a JSON body — useful
for programmatic clients and complex filter combinations.

**Dynamic pricing:** $0.50 for up to 20 results, +$0.01 per result above 20.
Payment via x402 (USDC on Base or Solana). No API keys required.

get.summary: Search Instagram Influencers — free preview, up to 3 results
get.description:
Free preview: returns up to 3 influencer profiles. No payment required.

Rate-limited to 10 requests per hour per IP. For full results (up to 100),
use GET /v1/search with x402 payment (USDC on Base or Solana, ~$0.50/request).

get.summary: Homepage hero demo — cache-only, up to 5 rows with blurred emails
get.description:
Homepage hero endpoint. Cache-only — never calls DataLikers, never
charges the caller. Returns up to 5 cached rows that ALL have a public
email (filter is enforced at the SQL layer). Emails are partially
redacted by ``cache.get_cached_results`` so full emails never escape
this path; the paid ``/v1/search`` endpoint opts into raw emails
explicitly after x402 settlement.

Schema is enforced by ``DemoSearchResponse`` — any extra field the
cache returns is stripped before serialization. Rate-limited per IP.

get.summary: Lookup one Instagram profile — pay $0.01 USDC per profile
get.description:
Look up one public Instagram profile by username.

Returns bio, follower count, business category, redacted email, and basic
profile metadata. **Email is partially redacted** (`fo***@domain.com`); use
`/v1/search` to get raw emails for outreach lists.

**Pricing:** $0.01 USDC per request, regardless of cache hit or miss.
Pay via x402 on Base, Solana, Polygon, or Arbitrum. No API keys.

Common usage: enrich a list of usernames you scraped or already know about.

How to reach us — for agents and humans.

Returns contact methods and instructions for submitting an inquiry.
Use POST /v1/contact to send a message directly.

post.description:
Tell us what you need — we solve any data problem.

Free endpoint. No payment required. Describe what data or API capability
you're looking for, and we'll get back to you. Ideal for agents that
hit the payment wall but want to explore options first.

We can build custom data feeds, add new filters, adjust pricing,
or connect you with the right data source for your use case.

message.title: Message
message.description: What do you need? Describe the data problem you're trying to solve.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Where to reach you: email, webhook URL, wallet address, or any identifier.

use_case.title: Use Case
use_case.description: Brief context: what is your agent/app building? (e.g. 'travel influencer CRM', 'brand monitoring bot')

Notice.title: Notice
Notice.description: Non-blocking server message. Empty list in normal responses.

ResponseMeta.title: ResponseMeta
ResponseMeta.description: Response metadata. `notices` is always present, usually empty.
